color.$description: Raw palette. Dark-first (kuroko = black), cool blue/purple temperature with a violet glow. Deep indigo-black surfaces, cool off-white text, violet primary + blue secondary accents. Semantic roles live in semantic.json.

ink.$description: Cool indigo near-blacks — the stagehand's black, tuned violet. Surfaces.

fog.$description: Cool off-whites / lavender-greys — text on dark.

violet.$description: The signature accent — vibrant violet, the source of the glow.

blue.$description: Secondary accent — cool blue/indigo for the blue-purple duo and gradients.

teal.$description: Tertiary accent — complementary teal against the violet/indigo field. Eyebrows, small labels, counterpoint highlights.
